Brawler.desc: Monstrous fighters in battle that deal a lot damage.
Brawler.Knight: Knight replenishes their resources with each takedown.
Brawler.Alpha: Alpha becomes a lot more fierceful with the pack.
Brawler.Viking: Viking is a relentless force that weakens attackers and strikes his target with lightning.
Brawler.Basilisk: Basilisk strives in long term battles poisoning opponents.
Brawler.Warrior: Warrior is blessed by the heavens.
Brawler.Slayer: Slayer is unmatched in raw strength.
Brawler.Challenger: Challenger weakens a soul until either one is vanquished.
Brawler.Shaman: Shaman is a mystical combatant that steals buffs.
Brawler.Vampire: Vampire drains the lifeforce of their opponents.
Brawler.Alchemist: Alchemist is a master of brews that crafts arcane potions from fallen foes.
Brawler.Wrath: Wrath overwhelms all opposition, crushing opponents with raw power.

Duelist.desc: Specialises in aggressive playstyles to outplay an opponent.
Duelist.Fisherman: Fisherman can teleport hooked enemies to them or may leap forward on marked location.
Duelist.Bomber: Bomber causes devastating area damage with explosives.
Duelist.Ninja: Ninja is a shadow assassin that teleports behind targets to dodge incoming attacks.
Duelist.Monkey: Monkey is a trickster whom has mastered the art of confusion.
Duelist.Hyper: Hyper is an agile scout that gains immense speed as they strike targets.
Duelist.Rogue: Rogue is a master of stealth and strikes harder from the back.
Duelist.Phoenix: Phoenix is a soaring bird of fire that dashes with boundless freedom through the air.
Duelist.Pirate: Pirate excels at plundering, earning gold and golden apples for each takedown
Duelist.Remnant: Remnant lingers between life and death, striking fear into opponents.

Ranged.desc: Damage opponents from afar whilst keeping your distance.
Ranged.Inferno: Inferno shoots flaming arrows that sets opponents ablaze.
Ranged.Scout: Scout is a lethal archer that uses withering arrows to suffocate their prey and vanish from sight.
Ranged.Artillery: Artillery has impeccable damage but has to be careful.
Ranged.Snowman: Snowman slows opponents and is quick on their feet.
Ranged.Wisp: Wisp is a spectral archer that shrouds its opponents in total darkness.

Tank.desc: Endure brutal amounts of unimaginable damage.
Tank.Star: Star is a celestial titan that stuns nearby players to restore its health.
Tank.Dragon: Dragon is a legendary combatant whom blasts targets aflame.
Tank.Hedgehog: Hedgehog is extremely resilient that reflects melee damage back at attackers.
Tank.Juggernaut: Juggernaut is a massive giant that gains permanent health for every takedown.
Tank.Behemoth: Behemoth is an ungodly titan that gains resistance as its health drops.
